The Problem

A Generation
at Risk

By 2030, 85% of jobs today's children will hold haven't been invented yet.

AI is replacing careers now. Children who learn to build technology will shape the future. Those who don't will be left behind.

Parents feel this urgency — their kids consume technology for hours daily. They want to flip that to creation.

What they find: Expensive English-only programs, or basic online coding where kids stare at another screen. No real projects. No physical building. No mentorship.

Who will teach them properly?

The Solution

EduZone Tech

What parents actually want: real education with real outcomes.

9 Learning Tracks

Coding, AI, Robotics, Apps, Web, Entrepreneurship

Real Hardware

LEGO WeDo, Arduino, sensors - physical smart cities & robots

Hybrid Delivery

On-site Cairo + live online worldwide in Arabic & English

AI Platform

Re-explain engine, competency tracking, certificates, auto-scheduling

Defensibility

5 Structural Moats

The advantage is the combination - no competitor has all five.

01

Most Integrated Hybrid Platform

Smaller hybrid competitors exist - none combine physical centers with 9 tracks, AI platform, and international delivery at this scale.

02

Full 9-Track Curriculum

Coding, AI, Robotics, Apps, Web, Entrepreneurship. No competitor covers this full stack.

03

Real Robotics Hardware

LEGO WeDo, Arduino, sensors. Students build physical smart cities & robots.

04

Unmatched Full-Stack Integration

Competitors offer coding in multiple languages. None integrate physical + online + hardware + AI + B2B + 9 tracks across 9 countries.

05

14 AI-Automated Systems

Re-explain, KPI engine, auto-scheduling, payslip, enrollment, competency tracking. 10x scale without 10x headcount.

Growth Story

Three Inflection Points

Each pivot built on the last - compounding into acceleration.

Aug 2024 - Centralization

Merged branches, doubled trainer quality. +145% Q1 growth.

May 2025 - Bundle Model

3-level tracks. Ticket to 5,433 EGP. Bundles = 53.6% of revenue.

Jan 2026 - AI Platform

eduzonetech.com live. Profiles, certificates, self-serve. 79 Q1 transactions.

Centralization - Bundling - Platform - International Scale

Photo: MIS Smart City - 6m maquette with 7 Arduino robots built by students in school collaboration 2025-2026
